svg.text: trust score inputs (computed nightly via BullMQ)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are customer reviews collected for trust scoring?')
sendPrompt('What is the order completion rate signal?')
sendPrompt('How is response time measured for trust scoring?')
sendPrompt('How does KYC verification affect trust score?')
sendPrompt('What is the exact trust score formula?')
sendPrompt('What trust badges exist and when are they assigned?')
g.text: 80–100: Trusted · 60–79: Good · 40–59: New · below 40: Review needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the trust score affect Typesense search ranking?')
sendPrompt('How does the shop see their trust score?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a shop trust score drops below 40?')
g.text: Low score alert → admin review queue
Below 40: FCM warning to shop · BullMQ admin alert · possible suspension
